Hello, I am looking for a Polish speaking person
who knows monaday.com very well a
nd will help me implement it in my company.
Krzysztof

posts.author: radoslaw.kosiec (Radoslaw)

Dzień dobry Krzysztof,
Zapraszam do kontaktu z naszym polskim zespołem: monday@deviniti.com
Pozdrawiam
Radoslaw Kosiec
